name: sachchidanandx-skills
description: Custom Claude Code plugins, skills, and agents

plugins.name: confluence-reader

plugins.name: jira-reader

plugins.name: openstack-webui

plugins.name: codebase-explorer
plugins.description: Socratic codebase exploration mentor — guides interactive learning of unfamiliar codebases through questioning and incremental discovery
